## What changed
- Added a PR template to standardize pull request descriptions.
- Added a self-review checklist in the docs folder.
- Updated README with a "How to run" section.

## Why
These changes help improve the pull request workflow and make it easier
for reviewers to understand the purpose and scope of each change.

## How to test
1. Clone the repository.
2. Activate the virtual environment.
3. Verify that the new files exist:
   - .github/pull_request_template.md
   - docs/pr-checklist.md
4. Confirm the README includes a "How to run" section.

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] README updated if behavior changed
- [ ] No debug code left in the project
